content: When i try to "make menuconfig" but can`t find "Rust support" under "General Setup" with all "depends on" true ? Is there something worng with my operation?
yes, and i got a return "Rust is available!"
Please search for RUST in menuconfig and copy-paste the Depends on: line.

Prompt: Rust support
Depends on: HAVE_RUST [=y] && RUST_IS_AVAILABLE [=y] && !MODVERSIONS [=y] && !GCC_PLUGINS [=y] && !RANDSTRUCT [=y] && !DEBUG_INFO_BTF [=y]
You need to disable MODVERSIONS etc. (notice the condition for some of those has a !)
oooooooooooh!!!! I successed! Thank you so much! I think "[=y]" menas true in the expression included "!". you really help me a lot!!!

I also struggled with this. Created a PR here to clarify in the docs: https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/pull/955/files

I didn't understand how to find the Depends on: block referred to above. Does this show in the UI somewhere when one runs make menuconfig?
I replied there -- yeah, please give a try to the "Search" functionality via the / key/button.
It will show the formula and what is currently met or not for all found symbols.
Ah - this makes sense. Thanks! Responded on the PR as well
